name: python3-pyexcel
title: python3-pyexcel
summary: Single API for reading, manipulating and writing data (Python 3)
description:
Single API for reading, manipulating and writing data (Python 3)
This package contains a Python Wrapper that provides single API for reading,
manipulating and writing data in csv, ods, xls, xlsx and xlsm files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyexcel because Single API for reading, manipulating and writing data (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyexcel as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyexcel with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyexcel --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
